Project firm_year_presence_2015_2024_XYTableToPoint D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\2、企业转点\企业转点.gdb\firm_year_presence_2015_2024_project PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_114E",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",114.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] # GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL
